text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intense battle of the Yayoi Sho draws to a
close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the race over, Manhattan Cafe senses that
Agnes Tachyon stands between her and her
friend. She decides to pursue Agnes Tachyon
instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an effort to run with Agnes Tachyon again,
Manhattan Cafe shoots for the Satsuki Sho, a
race in which Agnes Tachyon plans to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Manhattan Cafe's poor condition is worrying.
Having her compete in the Satsuki Sho or the
Japanese Derby in her current state would be a
gamble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set the St. Lite Kinen as our autumn race and
hold off making any decisions for the spring
season. I'll have to see how Manhattan Cafe
manages first.
